target.title: Add opt-in SQLite path for static Linux CLI builds
target.body:
Refs #1524

This is the second small step toward Swift Static Linux SDK / musl CLI compatibility. It does not add release artifacts and does not change the formal release matrix.

Stacked on #1601. Until #1601 merges, this PR includes the source-level musl compatibility commits from that PR plus the one Package.swift linker-path commit here.

Maintainer sign-off requested: this PR introduces `CODEXBAR_SQLITE3_LIB_DIR` as an opt-in build contract for static Linux SDK callers that need to provide a target-architecture static SQLite library. Default builds are unchanged when the variable is unset.

## Root cause

`CodexBarCLI` depends on `CodexBarCore`, which depends on `SweetCookieKit`. `SweetCookieKit` currently adds an unconditional `-lsqlite3` linker setting. The Swift Static Linux SDK musl sysroot does not ship `libsqlite3.a`, so after Swift source compilation succeeds the final static link fails with:

```text
ld.lld: error: unable to find library -lsqlite3
```

## Scope

This adds an opt-in `CODEXBAR_SQLITE3_LIB_DIR` Package.swift hook. When set, CodexBar passes `-L<dir>` to Linux links for `CodexBarCore` and `CodexBarCLI`, allowing a caller/CI job to provide a target-architecture static `libsqlite3.a` for Swift Static Linux SDK builds.

Default builds are unchanged when the variable is not set.

Explicitly not included:

- No release workflow changes
- No release matrix changes
- No SQLite vendoring in CodexBar
- No SweetCookieKit changes
- No static release artifact generation

Stack notes:

- #1601 should merge first, or this PR should be rebased after #1601, so the unique diff here is only the Package.swift linker-path hook.
- #1610 consumes this hook in the release workflow and verifies both `linux-musl-x64` and `linux-musl-arm64` artifact builds. This PR intentionally keeps artifact generation out of scope.

## Verification

Passed:

```bash
swiftformat Package.swift
swiftlint --strict --cache-path /private/tmp/codexbar-1524-swiftlint.cache
swift test --filter CLIEntryTests
swift test --filter CommandCodeUsageFetcherTests
swift test --filter DeepSeekUsageFetcherTests
swift test --filter KiroStatusProbeTests
```

Swift Static Linux SDK x86_64 musl build verified with an external static SQLite library:

```bash
curl -L https://www.sqlite.org/2026/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip \
  -o /private/tmp/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip
openssl dgst -sha3-256 /private/tmp/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip
# SHA3-256: 81142986038e18f96c4a54e1a72562ae17e502a916f2a7701eff43388cbf1a40

unzip -q /private/tmp/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip -d /private/tmp/sqlite-amalgamation
mkdir -p /private/tmp/codexbar-sqlite-musl/lib /private/tmp/codexbar-sqlite-musl/build

~/Library/Developer/Toolchains/swift-6.2.1-RELEASE.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang \
  -target x86_64-swift-linux-musl \
  --sysroot=$HOME/Library/org.swift.swiftpm/swift-sdks/swift-6.2.1-RELEASE_static-linux-0.0.1.artifactbundle/swift-6.2.1-RELEASE_static-linux-0.0.1/swift-linux-musl/musl-1.2.5.sdk/x86_64 \
  -O2 -DSQLITE_OMIT_LOAD_EXTENSION=1 \
  -c /private/tmp/sqlite-amalgamation/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200/sqlite3.c \
  -o /private/tmp/codexbar-sqlite-musl/build/sqlite3.o

~/Library/Developer/Toolchains/swift-6.2.1-RELEASE.xctoolchain/usr/bin/llvm-ar \
  crs /private/tmp/codexbar-sqlite-musl/lib/libsqlite3.a \
  /private/tmp/codexbar-sqlite-musl/build/sqlite3.o

env CODEXBAR_SQLITE3_LIB_DIR=/private/tmp/codexbar-sqlite-musl/lib \
  HOME=/private/tmp/codexbar-1524/.home \
  CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/private/tmp/codexbar-1524/.clang-module-cache \
  ~/Library/Developer/Toolchains/swift-6.2.1-RELEASE.xctoolchain/usr/bin/swift \
  build -c release --product CodexBarCLI \
  --swift-sdk swift-6.2.1-RELEASE_static-linux-0.0.1 \
  --triple x86_64-swift-linux-musl
```

Result: `Build of product 'CodexBarCLI' complete!`

Additional stack verification:

- #1610 verifies the follow-up release workflow path that consumes `CODEXBAR_SQLITE3_LIB_DIR`.
- #1610 manual release workflow run succeeded for both `linux-musl-x64` and `linux-musl-arm64`: https://github.com/Yuxin-Qiao/CodexBar/actions/runs/27735285990

Full `swift test` note:

- Full `swift test` ran 4272 tests but failed with timing/process-sensitive issues in `CommandCodeUsageFetcherTests`, `DeepSeekUsageFetcherTests`, and `KiroStatusProbeTests`.
- Those failing suites passed when rerun directly, as listed above.
target.author: yuxin-qiao
